atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing utility classes into custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a legacy JavaScript-based Tailwind CSS configuration file.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Register a custom Tailwind CSS variant.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Define styles in a Tailwind CSS cascade layer.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Load a legacy Tailwind CSS plugin.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Import Tailwind CSS theme variables, custom utilities, and variants for reference.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Explicitly register source files for Tailwind CSS class detection.

atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Legacy Tailwind CSS directive for injecting generated styles.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define Tailwind CSS theme variables and design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Register a custom Tailwind CSS utility.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Apply a Tailwind CSS variant to nested CSS rules.
